member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.EF.Tests.SqlServer.FakeRefreshTokenFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating test-safe instances of . Lives in Fakes for test-only usage, but uses Stub model for realistic shape.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.EF.Tests.SqlServer.FakeRefreshTokenFactory.Create(System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String)
member.summary: Creates a valid refresh token with optional user ID and username.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.EF.Tests.SqlServer.FakeRefreshTokenFactory.Expired(System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String)
member.summary: Creates an expired refresh token for testing expiration logic.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.EF.Tests.SqlServer.FakeRefreshTokenFactory.Revoked(System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String)
member.summary: Creates a revoked refresh token for testing revocation logic.
